62     result = await db.execute(text(f"""
63         SELECT
64             e.*,
65             COUNT(st.ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE st.status NOT IN ('resolved','closed')) AS open_tickets,
66             COUNT(st.ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE st.status IN ('resolved','closed'))     AS resolved_total,
67             ROUND(
68                 100.0 * COUNT(st.ticket_id) FILTER (WHERE st.status = 'resolved')
69                 / NULLIF(COUNT(st.ticket_id),0), 1
70             ) AS resolution_rate
71         FROM hospyn_employees e
72         LEFT JOIN support_tickets st ON st.assigned_employee_id = e.employee_id
73         WHERE {" AND ".join(filters)}
74         GROUP BY e.id, e.employee_id, e.full_name, e.email, e.team, e.level,
75                  e.shift_status, e.is_active, e.avatar_initials, e.phone,
76                  e.daily_ticket_limit, e.last_seen_at, e.created_at, e.updated_at
77         ORDER BY e.team, open_tickets DESC
78     """), params)
79     rows = [dict(r) for r in result.mappings().all()]
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.
